title: scutellaria glabrata
intro: Scutellaria glabrata, also known as Chinese skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Scutellaria glabrata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Scutellaria glabrata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
